lines.text: The GroupChat pattern is one of the few multi-agent ideas that earns its complexity, because it attacks specific failure modes with structure instead of prompt-level wishful thinking.
But it’s a tool with a narrow sweet spot. Most LLM calls in a real product are simple, latency-bound, and fine with one model.
Save the debate for the questions where you’d also want more than one human in the room. For those: stop asking one AI. Let them argue.
